IN1.observed: test_validate_rejects_invalid_authority_documents and test_validate_graph_schema_and_main PASSED (the dev-graph schema/C11 gate accepts confirmed spec/architecture with lineage and rejects invalid authority docs). The R3 import evidence gates are pinned by two deterministic scripts wired into the SKILL goal-seek verification block: validate-evidence-refs.py (evidence_ref existence, exit 2 on registered dangling) and validate-source-digest.py (per-path source_digest equality, exit 2 on reuse) — both cover 5 unit cases each in tests/test_validate_evidence_refs.py / tests/test_validate_source_digest.py. In the OUT1 live trial r10 both gates executed with EXIT:0 (registered_dangling=[], registered_mismatch=[]) and the system-spec-harness coverage/source-citation gate landed at exit0 through the harness 4 entry points to evaluator PASS.

OUT1.observed: 2026-07-24 再実走 (run 20260724T095200Z-system-spec-wt1r3, fresh claude session Opus 4.6, 自走完走 nudge=0/gate=0, 32 分 15 秒, 途中 auto-compact 発生): MVP-first 実装で挙動閉包 sha が更新され旧 verdict (wt1r2) が stale 化したため、fixture を baseline (ca42a87) へ戻して再取得。被験 Skill を index121 で起動し、delegate 先の system-spec-harness の 4 entry point (elicit / doc-fetch / compile / assign-system-spec-completeness-evaluator) も全て Skill ツール経由で起動。fresh evaluator が graph.json を直接読み、graph_revision=2 / node 2 件 (spec-system-spec-index, arch-requirements-definition) がいずれも source_lineage (origin_kind / source_plugin / source_path / source_version / source_digest / imported_at)・confirmation_status=confirmed・confirmation_evidence・implementation_readiness=complete を 保持することを実体で確認。source_digest 2 件と confirmation_evidence.evaluated_digest を shasum -a 256 で独立再計算して完全一致、upsert receipt の graph_sha256_before/after 連鎖 (0→1→2) と最終 graph_sha256_after (be555888…643a0c) の実ファイル再計算一致も確認。doc-fetch は実 WebFetch を行い、初期版数の誤り (SQLite 3.46 / FastAPI 0.115) を doc-freshness-auditor fork が検出して 3.53.3 / 0.139.2 へ訂正した 自己修正フローが audit-fork-ledger.jsonl に実データとして残存 (echo 偽装でない)。goal-seek 3 点セットは必須 6 キー充足・original_goal hash (30a1de05…382ce454) 一致・1 行目 (index114 の Write、skill 実行より前) と 2 行目 (index822 の append redirect、compact 後・全検証完了後) で append-only を実証。validate-source-digest.py (checked=2 / mismatch なし) と validate-evidence-refs.py (scanned=2 / dangling なし) も exit0。AskUserQuestion 0 件。blocker 0 で PASS。skill_dir_tree_sha が現行 closure と一致。
